allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\tina9\\axis-game-control"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -PassThru powershell -ArgumentList '-Command', 'npm run dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath "C:\\Users\\tina9\\axis-game-control\\.dev-server.log"' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id)

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\tina9\\axis-game-control\\.env.local" | Select-String "^TWELVELABS_API_KEY="\).ToString\(\).Split\("=",2\)[1]; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.twelvelabs.io/v1.2/indexes" -Method GET -Headers @{"x-api-key"=$key} -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty data | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count | ForEach-Object {"Existing indexes: $_"})

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\tina9\\axis-game-control\\.env.local" | Select-String "^TWELVELABS_API_KEY="\).ToString\(\).Split\("=",2\)[1]; foreach \($ver in @\("v1.3","v1.2","v1.1"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.twelvelabs.io/$ver/indexes" -Method GET -Headers @{"x-api-key"=$key} -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "v=$ver status=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; break } catch { "v=$ver -> $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } })

PowerShell($videos = @\("C:\\Users\\tina9\\Videos\\Screen Recordings\\Screen Recording 2026-05-25 054323.mp4","C:\\Users\\tina9\\Videos\\Captures\\windows laptop screen recorder laptop 2020 - Google Search - Google Chrome 2025-07-22 053636.mp4"\); foreach \($v in $videos\) { if \(Test-Path $v\) { $i = Get-Item $v; "$\([math]::Round\($i.Length/1MB,1\)\)MB  $\(Split-Path $v -Leaf\)" } })

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\tina9\\axis-game-control\\.env.local" | Select-String "^TWELVELABS_API_KEY="\).ToString\(\).Split\("=",2\)[1]; $body = '{"index_name":"axis-schema-probe","engines":[{"engine_name":"pegasus1.1","engine_options":["visual","conversation"]}]}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.twelvelabs.io/v1.3/indexes" -Method POST -Headers @{"x-api-key"=$key;"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object _id, index_name } catch { $err = $_.ErrorDetails.Message | ConvertFrom-Json; "Error $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\($err.message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server check: $_" })

hooks.command:
node -e "process.stderr.write('[axis] Loop: show up → check in → participate → history → return
[axis] Gate: does this improve Record/Moment/Film/Share/Return?
[axis] Frozen: axis-core.ts — do not add types without approval
[axis] Clean: learning-engine.ts must not know cameras, basketball, or AI providers
');"

node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND || ''; if (cmd.includes('git push') && !cmd.includes('--dry-run')) { process.stderr.write('[axis] Run npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build before pushing.\n'); }"

node -e "const path = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH || ''; if (path.includes('axis-core.ts')) { process.stderr.write('[axis] axis-core.ts is frozen vocabulary. Confirm this change is intentional.\n'); }"
